insight_source_id.title: Insight Source ID
insight_source_id.description: Stable identifier for this AD connector instance (e.g. 'active-directory-corp'). Required non-empty — the composite unique_key depends on it to discriminate multiple AD forests under one tenant.

ad_server_host.title: Domain Controller Host
ad_server_host.description: Hostname or IP of a domain controller / LDAP endpoint (no scheme, no port). E.g. 'dc1.corp.example.com'.

ad_port.title: LDAP Port
ad_port.description: LDAP port. Defaults to 636 when TLS is enabled, 389 otherwise.

ad_use_ssl.title: Use LDAPS (TLS)
ad_use_ssl.description: Connect over LDAPS/TLS. Strongly recommended — a plaintext bind sends ad_bind_password in the clear.

ad_bind_dn.title: Bind DN
ad_bind_dn.description: Service-account bind identity. Accepts a full DN ('CN=svc-insight,OU=Service,DC=corp,DC=example,DC=com') or a UPN ('svc-insight@corp.example.com'). Use a read-only account.

ad_search_base.title: Search Base DN
ad_search_base.description: Base DN to search for users (e.g. 'DC=corp,DC=example,DC=com' or a narrower 'OU=Employees,DC=corp,DC=example,DC=com').

ad_user_filter.title: User LDAP Filter
ad_user_filter.description: LDAP filter selecting user objects. Default targets enabled and disabled person accounts but excludes computers, contacts, and krbtgt.

ad_page_size.title: Paged-Search Page Size
ad_page_size.description: LDAP paged-results page size. AD's default MaxPageSize policy is 1000; 500 is safe.
